locations.clue: This copper giant guards New York Harbor and was a gift from France — where is she?
This iconic red suspension bridge spans the entrance to San Francisco Bay — find it.
These thundering waterfalls straddle the US–Canada border in Ontario — pinpoint them.
This ancient Mayan pyramid hosts a famous 'serpent shadow' on the spring equinox — where is it?
This dazzling crossroads in Midtown Manhattan hosts the world-famous New Year's Eve ball drop — find it.

The world's largest freshwater lake by surface area borders Minnesota, Wisconsin, and Michigan — find it.

The youngest and largest of the Hawaiian islands still has active lava flows reaching the ocean — pinpoint it.

The world's smallest and shallowest ocean sits at the top of the globe — place your pin there.

The only one of the five Great Lakes located entirely within the United States — find it.
